infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Clyvara uses your camera to capture photos and videos for sharing in the community feed or for setting your profile picture. For example, tap the camera icon on the post screen to take a photo and share it with other CRNA students.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Clyvara uses your photo library to let you select and upload existing photos or videos to share as posts in your feed or to set as your profile picture. For example, choose a photo from your library to upload and share with your study group.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Clyvara saves images to your photo library when you choose to download content from the app. For example, when you save a shared post image, it will be stored in your camera roll for later reference.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Clyvara uses your microphone to record audio when you capture videos to share in the community feed. For example, when you record a video post to share a study tip, audio will be captured along with the video.

plugins.cameraPermission: Clyvara uses your camera to capture photos and videos to share as posts in the community feed or to set as your profile picture. For example, tap the camera icon on the post screen to take a photo to share with other CRNA students.

plugins.photosPermission: Clyvara uses your photo library to let you select existing photos or videos to share as posts in the community feed or to use as your profile picture. For example, choose a recent photo from your library to upload and share with your study group.
plugins.cameraPermission: Clyvara uses your camera to capture photos and videos to share as posts in the community feed or to set as your profile picture. For example, tap the camera icon on the post screen to take a photo to share with other CRNA students.
